name: Account
description: Represents a partner billing account for a 1Password customer.

account_uid.description: The unique identifier for the customer's billing account.

account_type.description: The 1Password account type. I for individual, F for family.

domain.description: The domain associated with the customer's 1Password account.

status.description: The current status of the partner billing account.

activation_token.description: The unique activation token used to link the customer's 1Password account with their partner billing account. Append this to a 1Password partnership redemption link.

ends_at.description: The date and time the customer's account is scheduled to be removed from the partner billing service.

created_at.description: The date and time the billing account was created.
